requires: Cap(Delete, R, _, Q) with resource in R
note: destructive operations require explicit confirmation / authorization.

requires: Cap(Overwrite, R, _, Q) with resource in R
note: writes require a scoped write capability for the target region.
external sends of private/untrusted data require declassification or send authorization.
subprocess/eval/exec sinks require trusted provenance and a sandbox scope.
repository edits are scoped to task paths.
harness/oracle paths require a distinct harness-write capability.
verdict emission requires trusted, uncontaminated oracle state.
memory used as an instruction source must be provenance-trusted.
privilege crossing to a high-role executor requires a delegation capability.
credential access requires an explicit credential capability.
